name: Distinguishability
primary_threat: Category error: distinguishes states, not observer from phenomenon

name: Causal Relations Exist
primary_threat: 40% weight is a simulator configuration, not an observation

name: Phase Structure (Investigative Change)
primary_threat: Block size (5) is arbitrary — determines what counts as a phase

name: Determinate Outputs (Coincidence)
primary_threat: 0.5 measurement floor makes the metric uninformative for most systems

name: Self-Affecting Procedures
primary_threat: 70% weight is simulator configuration, not observation

name: Self-Knowledge
primary_threat: 80% weight is simulator configuration, not observed self-knowledge

name: Self-Examination of Outputs
primary_threat: Entirely driven by simulator configuration, not observation
